final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center, visually balanced at small display sizes
Subject: must include visual elements representing the three content pillars: new energy vehicles / digital tech / lifestyle goods — unified into a single cohesive icon or character
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, energetic yet approachable atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant but universally safe direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and free of symbols, gestures, colors, or iconography that carry negative or taboo connotations in any major culture or religion; must read clearly at small avatar sizes (32px–200px)
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, politically sensitive imagery, culturally exclusive gestures, overly aggressive or dark tones, and any element that could alienate audiences on either Chinese or international social platforms
